sheldonBrief.focusThisWeek: Sleep recovery. Everything else — HRV, recovery score, cognitive performance — cascades from sleep. Fix the 10pm screen-off compliance and the rest follows.
sheldonBrief.recommendation: Implement a hard 9:30pm wind-down block. Phone goes to charging station in another room. This is the single highest-ROI change available to you right now.

conflicts.title: Tuesday: Gym vs. Meetings
conflicts.description: Tuesday has 9 hours of meetings scheduled. Your gym session at 6pm is at risk — you've cancelled it 3 of the last 5 Tuesdays when meeting load exceeded 7 hours.
conflicts.sheldonRecommendation: Move to 6am. Your Wednesday already has a session scheduled.

conflicts.title: Friday Decompression at Risk
conflicts.description: A new investor call was added Friday 3:30-4:30pm, overlapping your 4-5pm decompression block.
conflicts.sheldonRecommendation: Move decompression to 5pm. Do not skip — you've cancelled 3 weeks running.

recoveryAlerts.title: High strain + poor sleep
recoveryAlerts.message: You hit a hard workout yesterday and slept 5.5 hours. Two morning meetings stacked before 10am. Recommend a lighter session today or active recovery only.

recoveryAlerts.title: 9-day recovery deficit
recoveryAlerts.message: Strain has exceeded recovery for 9 consecutive days. CNS fatigue risk is elevated. I recommend 2 consecutive rest days this weekend.

energyMap.insight: Your peak cognitive window is 9–11am. Currently you have admin tasks here 3 days a week. Want me to protect this block for deep work?

healthBusinessCorrelation.insight: Your best business weeks correlate with 7+ hours of sleep and 3+ workouts. Last week: 5.2hr sleep avg, 1 workout. This week's revenue target may be at risk.

suggestionQueue.title: Walking meeting — Tuesdays 11am
